text:
Last month to last week, I was so worried, looking for how to raise money, piggyvest too showing me shege ontop my own money, trying to borrow money from friends cause I was in a deep sh!t! 
Today, I’m peaceful, eating without anything giving me headaches. Our difficulties is also a phase, it might look like you won’t survive it but you will! Just hold on, hustle and pray! There’s always a payday for every hustler…someday, we won’t be worried about basic things anymore, we’ll make bigger financial decisions by God grace🙂🙏🏾.
